name: Purple Dragon Commandant
description: Increase your Strength or Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20. As a bonus action, you can bolster an ally within 30 feet, granting them 2d6 + your Strength or Dexterity modifier in temporary hit points. You can use this feature a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus per long rest. Additionally, you have advantage on attack rolls while you are bloodied.
